title: Calm Craft 2
description: Anything but calm... This pack has a little bit of everything for everyone, from farming to building to exploration.
body:
## About

This is a 1.19.2 Fabric remake of my original Calm Craft modpack (now discontinued on CurseForge). This version does not hide behind the Vanilla+ label; there are many mods that change how Minecraft is played, from new biomes to dungeons to dimensions. 6 GB of memory is recommended to use this modpack.

Inspired by Better MC, this pack takes a roguelike approach to the chosen mods. YUNG's mods revamp the strongholds, temples, dungeons, mineshafts, and more from the vanilla game while a plethora of other mods add entirely new structures. Villages are enhanced with their own collection of mods as well, with new buildings, layouts, and villagers.

Performance was a huge concern, so the Sodium family is included (except for Phosphor, which I replaced with Starlight) as well as Iris for anyone that wishes to use shaders.

This is all alongside a large collection of QoL improvements.

## Attributions

- [More Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)
- [Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective)
